data.title: Compass Surgical Partners and Cardiovascular Institute bring first outpatient cath lab to Panama City, Florida. #HealthcareInnovation
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina and Panama City, Florida, Compass Surgical Partners (Compass) revealed on January 28, 2026, through a PRNewswire release, their collaboration with local physicians to establish a full-service ambulatory surgery center (ASC). Compass, a prominent independent ASC development and management partner, aims to enhance healthcare services through this partnership.
EU's Costa: 'Arrived in Hanoi, we are opening a new chapter tomorrow in the EU-Viet Nam partnership'

data.title: VF Corp reported Q3 2026 earnings of 56 cents per share, beating estimates, with sales of $2.876 billion. The North Face and Timberland saw growth. CEO mentioned Vans results as expected. They also sold the Dickies brand.
data.description: VF Corporation (NYSE: VFC) released its third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, exceeding expectations. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of 56 cents, surpassing the estimated 45 cents. Third-quarter sales totaled $2.876 billion, higher than the anticipated $2.768 billion. The strong performance was driven by an impressive holiday season, particularly by The North Face, Timberland, Americas region, and direct-to-consumer channel. CEO Bracken Darrell highlighted The North Face and Timberland's growth at 8% and 5% respectively in constant dollars, while Vans met expectations. Moreover, on September 15, 2025, VF Corporation signed a definitive agreement to sell the Dickies brand business to Bluestar Alliance LLC. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Kris Kehl joins Planet Home Lending to expand California presence as Senior Mortgage Loan Officer.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Planet Home Lending, a leading mortgage lender and servicer, announced the hiring of Kris Kehl (NMLS #321079) as the Senior Mortgage Loan Officer in California, as part of its ongoing expansion efforts in the Western region. This move underscores the company's commitment to strengthening its presence in the lucrative California market.

data.title: Boston Mutual Life Insurance Company partners with Hockey East Association. Sponsors campaign honoring first responders. Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: A national life insurance carrier based in New England, Boston Mutual Life Insurance Company, is sponsoring the Hockey East Heroes campaign to recognize first responders. This initiative aims to honor the brave individuals who serve as lifelines in emergencies. Boston Mutual Life Insurance Company, known for providing insurance solutions for workplaces and individuals across the country, announced this partnership on January 28, 2026, in Canton, Massachusetts. The campaign serves as a tribute to the dedication of these heroes and underscores the importance of their service. This sponsorship signifies the company's commitment to supporting those who risk their lives for others.

data.title: ASYST Technologies launches Opti‑Flex™ Cable Adjuster, promising improved headlamp aiming accessibility and accuracy.
data.description: Today, ASYST Technologies, a top supplier of automotive lighting aiming and adjustment systems based in KENOSHA, Wis., revealed the release of its Opti-Flex™ design. This innovative rigid-flexible solution enhances headlamp aiming accessibility and accuracy in compact assemblies. The new product aims to improve precision in headlamp positioning, offering a more effective solution for compact setups. The Opti-Flex™ design is set to revolutionize the industry by providing enhanced convenience and accuracy for users.

data.title: GeoPark renews offtake deal with Vitol in Colombia, to sell 100% of crude oil production in the Llanos basin.
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia, GeoPark Limited ("GeoPark"), a prominent independent energy company with a solid track record of over two decades in Latin America, disclosed an updated offtake and prepayment deal with Vitol. This agreement, pertaining to the Llanos basin in Colombia, has been extended and broadened to enhance collaboration. Under the new terms, GeoPark will exclusively supply all its crude oil output from the Llanos basin to Vitol. GeoPark's relationship with Vitol will continue to evolve with this renewed partnership.

data.title: Strive closes upsized, oversubscribed follow-on offering of 1,320,000 shares of SATA Stock at $90/share.
data.description: In Dallas on January 28, 2026, Strive, Inc. disclosed the completion of its follow-on offering through Nasdaq under the tickers ASST and SATA. The company finalized the sale of 1,320,000 shares of its Variable Rate Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock known as SATA Stock. The shares were sold at a price of $90 each in the public offering.

data.title: Decklar sees 48% YoY revenue growth in 2026, expanding global adoption with Decision AI in supply chain operations.
data.description: A corporation is enhancing its AI-native platform base, expanding multi-solution enterprise deployments, and improving autonomous supply chain capabilities with RADAR in Santa Clara, California, as of January 28, 2026. Decklar, the Real-Time Decision AI platform for global supply chains, is focusing on bolstering its foundation and incorporating advanced features to serve a wider range of clients and operations. This initiative aims to boost efficiency and productivity while adapting to the evolving demands of the industry.

data.title: EAM closes $575M Fund II for growth software/tech investments.
data.description: A private equity firm based in Boston, Equality Asset Management (EAM), has disclosed the completion of its second fund, named EAM Private Equity Partners II, L.P. This fund focuses on investing in innovative growth software and technology enterprises. The announcement was made on January 28, 2026. No specific investment amounts or figures were provided.

data.title: Bascom Northwest Ventures sells Tempo at Riverpark Apartments for $105,000,000 to Hines Affiliate.
data.description: Bascom Northwest Ventures, LLC has recently sold the Tempo at Riverpark Apartments in Denver. This property, consisting of 235 units, was purchased by a venture led by Hines for a total of $105,000,000. This marks a significant transaction in the real estate market in the area, showcasing the continued interest in multifamily properties.

data.title: Seller Ledger introduces new accounting tools for Amazon sellers, ensuring accurate data reconciliation without third-party connectors. Founded in 2023.
data.description: Seller Ledger has recently introduced a new set of ecommerce accounting solutions tailored for Amazon sellers. These tools allow for comprehensive data reconciliation without the need for any third-party connectors. The company, based in Incline Village, Nevada, unveiled this suite of tools in March 2023. This development greatly enhances the accuracy and transparency of financial records for sellers, ensuring seamless operations.

data.title: Visa's study shows increase in winter travel interest before 2026 Winter Olympics, with AI being widely used for planning.
data.description: In San Francisco, Visa shared updated U.S. data from its Winter Sports Study, indicating a notable increase in winter travel enthusiasm leading up to the 2026 Winter Olympics. This will be the inaugural Winter Games where Gen AI plays a significant role in consumer research and trip preparation. The study highlights a rising interest in winter sports alongside a consistent trend of domestic travel popularity. Furthermore, it underscores the integration of AI technology into mainstream practices for destination exploration, trip organization, and other travel-related activities.

data.title: Skimmer appoints Hal Denbar to board, bolstering platform for pool service businesses. Denbar has 20+ years of experience.
data.description: Based in Austin, Texas, Skimmer revealed the addition of Hal Denbar as a board member and advisor, solidifying its standing as the go-to operations platform for substantial pool service enterprises. With over two decades in establishing and managing pool service companies, Denbar commenced his journey as an individual operator in 2006 before contributing to the expansion of Patriot Pool & Spa and National Pool Partners - the latter being acquired by Certus Pest in a recent development.

data.title: SHOPLINE teams up with Flywheel Strategy to enhance growth for scaling brands, with 600,000 merchants on board.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 28, 2026, SHOPLINE, a renowned global commerce platform, revealed its collaboration with Flywheel Strategy, a digital, ecommerce, and business operations advisory firm. With a significant network of over 600,000 merchants, SHOPLINE aims to enhance its scalability and efficiency through this partnership.

data.title: Randy Wootton joins CEO Coaching International as Partner and Coach, known SaaS executive and advisor.
data.description: Miami – CEO Coaching International, a renowned firm providing coaching services to CEOs and entrepreneurs seeking growth opportunities worldwide, has appointed Randy Wootton as its latest Partner and Coach. Wootton, with a background as a SaaS executive, board member, and advisor, brings over two decades of experience to the firm. This partnership highlights CEO Coaching International's dedication to expanding its team with industry experts, further solidifying its position as a leading coaching firm.
